## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CctvOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CctvOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
camera, surveillance, recording, film, videotape, crime, watching

## Categories
security, devices, communication, connectivity, photography

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/cctv-off)
